events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the conduit is only staged (not yet installed) but its size/class markings are hidden by packaging orientation, this is a verification gap rather than a confirmed defect — decision is `needs_more_info` with medium risk, calling for markings to be exposed and checked against the drawing (per NEC 110.21, 344.6, 352.130) before rough-in proceeds.
